other_observers: MOB; Larry Arnold found the bird on his feeders and reported it. Many colorado birders have seen this first state record bird.
description: Got good pictures. Really unmistakable. Male with the black face, yellow belly patch, yellow on wings.Behaviors: Eating on the thistle feeder made for great photo opps. LEGO and AMGO were also on the feeders for easy comparison.Call: not heard by me.Plumage: breeding
